anchor.snippet: Actuarial science is the discipline that applies mathematical and statistical methods to assess risk

annotations.label: Present value of a future sum

anchor.snippet: referred to as the present value of a future sum
predictable patterns of longevity and death in a group, or cohort

annotations.label: Halley's life table and annuity premium

anchor.snippet: Halley constructed his own life table, and showed how it could be used to calculate the premium amount
"commutation functions" (essentially precalculated columns of summations over time of discounted values of survival and death probabilities)
